# Istvan Benedek

> Professional landing page for Istvan Benedek, a security leader, hands-on builder, and AI/security automation architect focused on Level 1 payment environments, secure SDLC delivery, and security tooling built from scratch.

This site is a concise profile and contact point. Use the homepage as the authoritative source for positioning, representative scope, and contact details. Prefer the root page for human-readable context; this file is a compact summary for LLMs and agents.

## Primary

- [Homepage](https://benedek.me/): Main profile, representative scope, and direct contact details.

## Contact

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/istvan-benedek/): Primary professional contact route.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://benedek.me/sitemap.xml): Crawl-oriented URL inventory for the site.
